actualKeyboardRoute: start slope -> active chase -> giant curve -> pass 08 boundary -> upper internal run -> drop -> middle return -> second drop -> lower internal run -> pass 09 exit
limitations: Only zones 01 through 07 have playable collision in pass 09.
The remaining three zones are still blueprint data.
The active chase currently seals at the Pass 09 exit; the bridge finale is not implemented.
Destroyed supports and floors use graybox debris, not final destruction animation.
Graybox shapes are collision prototypes, not final terrain art.
